mapper.select: select count(*) from post where p_type = #{c} and p_status = 'Y'

select * from post join users using(user_id) where p_type = #{c}
and p_status = 'Y' order by p_number desc
select * from post join users using(user_id) where p_number = #{id} and p_status = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
select seq_post.nextval from dual
insert into post values(#{rNumber}, #{rTitle}, #{rContents}, default, sysdate, #{pType}, #{userId})
mapper.select: select * from(select * from post join users using(user_id) where p_type = 'R' and p_status = 'Y' order by views desc) where rownum < = 5
select * from reply join users using(user_id) where p_number = #{pNumber} and c_status = 'Y' order by c_number desc
mapper.insert: insert into reply values(seq_reply.nextval, #{comments}, default, #{pNumber}, #{userId}, default)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM RNUM, A.* FROM ( select * from post join users using(user_id) where p_title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR user_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' order by p_number desc ) A ) WHERE RNUM BETWEEN #{pi.startRow} AND #{pi.endRow}
select count(*) from post join users using(user_id) where p_title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR user_name like '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
